action.message:
Agent execution completed in the use_cases workspace. Please verify:

1. INTERFACE INTEGRITY — if any use case .py file was modified, confirm validate_tools() still passes for it
2. SAFETY RULES — confirm no tool function was changed to raise instead of returning an error string
3. stop() — confirm stop() still sends a hardware stop command and catches all exceptions
4. CREDENTIALS — confirm no passwords or API keys were introduced into return strings or log messages
5. PHYSICS CONSTANTS — if any physics constant was changed, flag it for re-measurement on real hardware
6. base_tools.py — if REQUIRED_FUNCTIONS or REQUIRED_PHYSICS was changed, confirm all existing use cases still pass validate_tools()

Report any concerns.
